data.name: Follow the Leader
data.detailed_description:
THE STORY
WARNING 18+: You live in a world where men called barons have all of the authority and power. Your mother was added to a baron's harem, and with you tagging along you were raised as a servant in his home until she eventually had enough of his cruel ways and ran away, leaving you to suffer alone. You've made the best of it throughout your time there, however, and have finally earned enough credits at twenty-five to buy your freedom.

Well, at least you did have enough were it not for your interference in the baron's abuse of his lab-grown harem of perfect women because they refuse to sleep with him. You're thrown in his prison to be executed the following day as a reward for your heroism, but the three cloned women help you before that happens, and you all escape together.

Where will you go? What will you do? It's up to you to figure that out.


THE GAME PLAY
In Follow the Leader, you play as the main character and handle all of the decision-making as it relates to your escape from the baron and his army of personal guards. You'll also be deciding which characters you'll be spending time with, and how you interact with them. Most choices have hidden points that you gain or lose, so be careful before making a decision!

***A free in-game walkthrough is also included for those who have trouble with selecting the correct choices, or for players who want to access every scene!***

FEATURES
- Name your own character
- Define the relationship within the game
- Select choices that shape the story you want
- Replay the game and choose different choices to access all content

data.short_description: You live in a world where men called barons have all the power, and you were raised as a servant for one until earning enough to buy your freedom, but that freedom is jeopardized when witnessing the baron's abuse of his lab-grown harem of perfect women because they refuse to sleep with him.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
